# SSL_RSA_WITH_IDEA_CBC_MD5

**Global Variable**

This value can be specified for SSL 2 but not SSL 3.

## Declaration

```swift
var SSL_RSA_WITH_IDEA_CBC_MD5: SSLCipherSuite { get }
```
